title: Plants Need Light!
description: Plants and crops now need sunlight to grow, light from other sources no longer work.
body:
This mod now changes how plants, crops, and saplings are grown in Minecraft by now making them required to have a source of natural sunlight to grow. This is to add agriculture immersion and a bit more realism into the game.

Torches and other light sources no longer provide light for crops to grow aswell.
